Goa.name: Baga Beach
Goa.description: Famous beach known for water sports, shacks, and vibrant nightlife.

Goa.name: Fort Aguada
Goa.description: 17th-century Portuguese fort with a lighthouse overlooking the Arabian Sea.

Goa.name: Calangute Beach
Goa.description: The largest beach in Goa, popular for swimming and sunbathing.

Goa.name: Dudhsagar Falls
Goa.description: Stunning four-tiered waterfall deep inside the Goa jungle.

Goa.name: Old Goa Churches
Goa.description: UNESCO Heritage churches including Basilica of Bom Jesus.

Goa.name: Anjuna Flea Market
Goa.description: Colourful weekly market selling crafts, clothes, and local produce.

Manali.name: Rohtang Pass
Manali.description: High mountain pass at 3,978m with breathtaking snow views.

Manali.name: Solang Valley
Manali.description: Adventure hub for skiing, paragliding, and zorbing.

Manali.name: Hadimba Temple
Manali.description: Ancient wooden temple surrounded by cedar forests.

Manali.name: Old Manali
Manali.description: Charming village with cafes, hippie culture, and riverside walks.

Manali.name: Beas River
Manali.description: Scenic river ideal for rafting and peaceful walks.

Manali.name: Naggar Castle
Manali.description: Medieval stone castle converted into a heritage hotel with Himalayan views.

Rishikesh.name: Laxman Jhula
Rishikesh.description: Iconic suspension bridge over the Ganga with temples and ashrams nearby.

Rishikesh.name: Ram Jhula
Rishikesh.description: Another famous iron bridge and spiritual landmark on the Ganges.

Rishikesh.name: River Rafting
Rishikesh.description: Thrilling white-water rafting on the Ganges through scenic rapids.

Rishikesh.name: Triveni Ghat
Rishikesh.description: Sacred bathing ghat where three rivers meet, famous for evening aarti.

Rishikesh.name: Beatles Ashram
Rishikesh.description: Abandoned ashram visited by The Beatles in 1968, now an art landmark.

Rishikesh.name: Neer Garh Waterfall
Rishikesh.description: Beautiful waterfall reachable by a scenic jungle trek.

Kanyakumari.name: Vivekananda Rock Memorial
Kanyakumari.description: Iconic monument built on a rocky islet where Swami Vivekananda meditated.

Kanyakumari.name: Sunrise Point
Kanyakumari.description: Famous spot to witness the spectacular trifurcation of sunrise over three seas.

Kanyakumari.name: Kumari Amman Temple
Kanyakumari.description: Ancient sea-facing temple dedicated to the goddess Kanyakumari.

Kanyakumari.name: Thiruvalluvar Statue
Kanyakumari.description: 133-foot statue of the Tamil poet-saint standing on a small island.

Kanyakumari.name: Gandhi Memorial
Kanyakumari.description: Memorial built where Mahatma Gandhi's ashes were kept before immersion.

Pondicherry.name: French Quarter
Pondicherry.description: Charming colonial streets with colourful buildings, cafes, and boutiques.

Pondicherry.name: Auroville
Pondicherry.description: Experimental universal township promoting human unity and sustainable living.

Pondicherry.name: Promenade Beach
Pondicherry.description: Peaceful beach boulevard perfect for morning walks and sunsets.

Pondicherry.name: Sri Aurobindo Ashram
Pondicherry.description: Spiritual ashram founded by Sri Aurobindo, open to all visitors.

Pondicherry.name: Basilica of Sacred Heart
Pondicherry.description: Beautiful Gothic-style church with impressive stained glass windows.

Pondicherry.name: Paradise Beach
Pondicherry.description: Secluded beach accessible by boat, ideal for swimming and relaxation.

Leh-Ladakh.name: Pangong Lake
Leh-Ladakh.description: Stunning high-altitude lake with shimmering blue waters spanning India and China.

Leh-Ladakh.name: Nubra Valley
Leh-Ladakh.description: Cold desert valley with sand dunes, Bactrian camels, and monasteries.

Leh-Ladakh.name: Leh Palace
Leh-Ladakh.description: Nine-storey palace overlooking Leh city with panoramic mountain views.

Leh-Ladakh.name: Thiksey Monastery
Leh-Ladakh.description: Impressive 12-storey monastery resembling the Potala Palace of Tibet.

Leh-Ladakh.name: Magnetic Hill
Leh-Ladakh.description: Mysterious hill where vehicles appear to roll uphill against gravity.

Leh-Ladakh.name: Shanti Stupa
Leh-Ladakh.description: White-domed Buddhist stupa with spectacular 360-degree views of Ladakh.

Tirupati.name: Tirumala Venkateswara Temple
Tirupati.description: One of the world's most visited temples, dedicated to Lord Venkateswara.

Tirupati.name: Sri Padmavathi Temple
Tirupati.description: Sacred temple in Tiruchanur dedicated to Goddess Padmavathi.

Tirupati.name: Kapila Theertham
Tirupati.description: Ancient temple at the foothills with a waterfall sacred to Lord Shiva.

Tirupati.name: Chandragiri Fort
Tirupati.description: 16th-century fort that was once the capital of the Vijayanagara kings.

Tirupati.name: TTD Gardens
Tirupati.description: Beautifully maintained gardens managed by the Tirumala Tirupati board.

Andaman Islands.name: Radhanagar Beach
Andaman Islands.description: Ranked among Asia's best beaches with turquoise waters and white sand.

Andaman Islands.name: Cellular Jail
Andaman Islands.description: Historic colonial prison turned national memorial, famous for light-and-sound show.

Andaman Islands.name: Elephant Beach
Andaman Islands.description: Popular snorkelling spot with vibrant coral reefs and clear waters.

Andaman Islands.name: Ross Island
Andaman Islands.description: Former British administrative headquarters now in picturesque ruins.

Andaman Islands.name: Scuba Diving at Neil Island
Andaman Islands.description: World-class diving with diverse marine life and coral formations.

Andaman Islands.name: Barren Island Volcano
Andaman Islands.description: India's only active volcano, visible by boat cruise at night.

Mysore.name: Mysore Palace
Mysore.description: Magnificent royal palace with stunning Indo-Saracenic architecture and light show.

Mysore.name: Chamundeshwari Temple
Mysore.description: Hilltop temple dedicated to Goddess Chamundeshwari with city views.

Mysore.name: Brindavan Gardens
Mysore.description: Famous terraced garden with musical fountains below the KRS Dam.

Mysore.name: Mysore Zoo
Mysore.description: One of India's oldest and best-maintained zoological parks.

Mysore.name: St. Philomena's Cathedral
Mysore.description: Gothic-style church with stunning stained glass windows and towering spires.

Coorg.name: Abbey Falls
Coorg.description: Stunning waterfall surrounded by coffee plantations and spice estates.

Coorg.name: Raja's Seat
Coorg.description: Scenic viewpoint where the Kodagu kings watched sunsets over the hills.

Coorg.name: Namdroling Monastery
Coorg.description: Tibetan Buddhist monastery known as the Golden Temple with intricate murals.

Coorg.name: Talakaveri
Coorg.description: Origin of the sacred Cauvery river, surrounded by misty forested hills.

Coorg.name: Dubare Elephant Camp
Coorg.description: Riverside camp where you can interact with and bathe trained elephants.

Coorg.name: Iruppu Falls
Coorg.description: Scenic waterfall near the Kerala border, sacred to pilgrims and trekkers.

Jaipur.name: Amber Fort
Jaipur.description: Majestic hilltop fort with stunning mirror work, courtyards, and elephant rides.

Jaipur.name: Hawa Mahal
Jaipur.description: Iconic five-storey palace of winds with 953 small windows for royal ladies.

Jaipur.name: City Palace
Jaipur.description: Royal palace complex housing museums with textiles, weapons, and paintings.

Jaipur.name: Jantar Mantar
Jaipur.description: UNESCO-listed 18th-century astronomical observatory with giant instruments.

Jaipur.name: Nahargarh Fort
Jaipur.description: Hilltop fort offering panoramic views of Jaipur city and the Aravalli hills.

Jaipur.name: Johri Bazaar
Jaipur.description: Vibrant market famous for jewellery, textiles, and traditional Rajasthani crafts.

Varanasi.name: Dashashwamedh Ghat
Varanasi.description: Main ghat of Varanasi, famous for the spectacular Ganga Aarti each evening.

Varanasi.name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
Varanasi.description: One of the 12 Jyotirlingas, dedicated to Lord Shiva, in the old city.

Varanasi.name: Boat Ride on Ganga
Varanasi.description: Sunrise boat ride past ghats and cremation sites — a deeply moving experience.

Varanasi.name: Sarnath
Varanasi.description: Deer Park where Buddha gave his first sermon, with a museum and stupa.

Varanasi.name: Manikarnika Ghat
Varanasi.description: Sacred cremation ghat burning continuously for thousands of years.

Varanasi.name: Tulsi Manas Temple
Varanasi.description: White marble temple where the Ramcharitmanas was written by Tulsidas.

Gokarna.name: Om Beach
Gokarna.description: Naturally Om-shaped beach with calm waters and scenic rocky headlands.

Gokarna.name: Mahabaleshwar Temple
Gokarna.description: Ancient Shiva temple with a sacred Atmalinga drawing devotees year-round.

Gokarna.name: Kudle Beach
Gokarna.description: Quiet crescent beach with budget cafes and stunning sunsets.

Gokarna.name: Half Moon Beach
Gokarna.description: Secluded beach accessible only by foot or boat, perfect for camping.

Gokarna.name: Paradise Beach
Gokarna.description: The most remote and pristine beach in Gokarna, ideal for backpackers.

Darjeeling.name: Tiger Hill
Darjeeling.description: Famous sunrise viewpoint where Kanchenjunga and Everest are visible on clear days.

Darjeeling.name: Darjeeling Himalayan Railway
Darjeeling.description: UNESCO-listed toy train winding through tea gardens and forested hills.

Darjeeling.name: Tea Gardens
Darjeeling.description: Visit Happy Valley or Makaibari estates to see and taste Darjeeling tea.

Darjeeling.name: Batasia Loop
Darjeeling.description: Scenic spiral railway loop with a war memorial and mountain panorama.

Darjeeling.name: Japanese Peace Pagoda
Darjeeling.description: White Buddhist stupa near Darjeeling with serene gardens and Himalayan views.

Darjeeling.name: Ghoom Monastery
Darjeeling.description: Oldest monastery in Darjeeling, home to a large statue of Maitreya Buddha.

Hampi.name: Virupaksha Temple
Hampi.description: Living temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, continuously worshipped for centuries.

Hampi.name: Vittala Temple
Hampi.description: Famous for its stone chariot and musical pillars that produce musical notes.

Hampi.name: Hampi Bazaar
Hampi.description: Ancient market street lined with ruins running up to the Virupaksha Temple.

Hampi.name: Elephant Stables
Hampi.description: Magnificent row of chambers that once housed the royal elephants.

Hampi.name: Matanga Hill
Hampi.description: Best sunrise viewpoint in Hampi with 360-degree views of the ruins.

Hampi.name: Tungabhadra River
Hampi.description: Sacred river with coracle rides offering views of boulders and ancient ruins.

Kedarnath.name: Kedarnath Temple
Kedarnath.description: One of the 12 Jyotirlingas, nestled in the Himalayas at 3,583m altitude.

Kedarnath.name: Bhairavnath Temple
Kedarnath.description: Temple dedicated to the guardian deity of Kedarnath, believed to protect the valley.

Kedarnath.name: Gandhi Sarovar
Kedarnath.description: Scenic glacial lake near Kedarnath, also known as Chorabari Lake.

Kedarnath.name: Shankaracharya Samadhi
Kedarnath.description: Memorial to Adi Shankaracharya who is said to have attained samadhi here.

Kedarnath.name: Vasuki Tal
Kedarnath.description: High-altitude glacial lake offering views of the Chaukhamba peaks.

Alleppey.name: Alleppey Backwaters
Alleppey.description: Network of canals, rivers, and lakes best explored on a houseboat.

Alleppey.name: Alleppey Beach
Alleppey.description: Long sandy beach with a historic pier stretching into the Arabian Sea.

Alleppey.name: Punnamada Lake
Alleppey.description: Scenic lake hosting the famous Nehru Trophy Boat Race every August.

Alleppey.name: Krishnapuram Palace
Alleppey.description: 18th-century palace showcasing Kerala murals and traditional architecture.

Alleppey.name: Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple
Alleppey.description: Ancient temple famous for its palpayasam — a sweet rice offering.

Alleppey.name: Marari Beach
Alleppey.description: Pristine, less-crowded beach with coconut groves and fishing villages.

Mahabalipuram.name: Shore Temple
Mahabalipuram.description: UNESCO World Heritage temple built in the 8th century overlooking the sea.

Mahabalipuram.name: Five Rathas
Mahabalipuram.description: Monolithic rock-cut chariots carved in the shape of temple towers.

Mahabalipuram.name: Arjuna's Penance
Mahabalipuram.description: World's largest open-air rock relief depicting scenes from the Mahabharata.

Mahabalipuram.name: Mahabalipuram Beach
Mahabalipuram.description: Sandy beach beside the Shore Temple, perfect for an evening walk.

Mahabalipuram.name: Krishna's Butter Ball
Mahabalipuram.description: Massive natural boulder perfectly balanced on a hillside — a geological wonder.

Shimla.name: The Mall Road
Shimla.description: Main pedestrian promenade lined with shops, restaurants, and colonial buildings.

Shimla.name: Christ Church
Shimla.description: Second oldest church in North India with beautiful stained glass windows.

Shimla.name: Jakhu Temple
Shimla.description: Hilltop Hanuman temple at 2,455m, offering the best views of Shimla.

Shimla.name: Kufri
Shimla.description: Popular hill resort near Shimla, known for skiing and Himalayan views.

Shimla.name: Viceregal Lodge
Shimla.description: Stunning Tudor-style building that was once the summer retreat of the British Viceroy.

Shimla.name: Toy Train to Shimla
Shimla.description: UNESCO-listed Kalka-Shimla railway with breathtaking mountain scenery.

Rameswaram.name: Ramanathaswamy Temple
Rameswaram.description: One of the 12 Jyotirlingas with the longest temple corridor in the world.

Rameswaram.name: Pamban Bridge
Rameswaram.description: India's first sea bridge, connecting Rameswaram island to the mainland.

Rameswaram.name: Dhanushkodi
Rameswaram.description: Ghost town at the island's tip where two oceans meet — hauntingly beautiful.

Rameswaram.name: Agnitheertham
Rameswaram.description: Sacred sea bathing ghat on the east coast, believed to cleanse sins.

Rameswaram.name: Abdul Kalam Memorial
Rameswaram.description: Memorial dedicated to former President Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, a Rameswaram native.
